MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,537.73 FILED BY JMT LEASING, INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL AS TO DEFENDANT PAN, XIAN PAN GREEN, LATAMARA LEE HAWKINS, YOLANDA ADAMS,CHRISTOPHER TABER, RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JMT LEASING, INC. DBA THRIFTY CAR RENTAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAN, XIAN PAN HAWKINS, YOLANDA ADAMS,CHRISTOPHER TABER, RAYMOND $1,537.37 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,592.37, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT. GREEN. DEFTS HAWKINS ADAMS AND TABER ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
